Appearances:
Plaintiff, Mercy Housing is present. Represented by Mrs. Lau
Attorney, Daniel Bornstein, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Billie Webb , is present.
Attorney, Thomas Drohan , representing the defendant through full scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Roger Rubin, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 207, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of APR-26-2010 is vacated.
